title: DANDYCORP Cobblemon Additions
description: A plethora of Create and Cobblemon related additions for The DANDYCORP Pack
body:
DANDYCORP Cobblemon Additions

DANDYCORP Cobblemon Additions is the required core mod for The DANDYCORP Pack, packed with exciting features to enhance your Cobblemon experience. Whether you're shiny hunting, managing resources, or diving into post-game content, this mod brings fresh systems and tools to keep your gameplay engaging.

Currently available for Fabric 1.20.1, with plans to break down some features into standalone mods, allowing you to mix and match your experience across multiple versions.

Features

The Grinder and Vendor

  • Introduces the DANDYCORP Industrial Grinder, a machine that converts items into Tickets, a new in-game currency.
  • Use Tickets to purchase rare items, resources, and unique collectibles from the DANDYCORP Vendor.
  • Items are assigned point values using a configurable recursive algorithm, letting you fine-tune how players earn Tickets.

Mega Stones for Mega Evolution

  • Collect Mega Stones to temporarily evolve your Pokémon into powerful Mega forms during battle.
  • Includes a Mega Stone for every currently available Mega Evolution from the mainline Pokémon games.
  • Requires the CobblemonMegas mod for Mega Evolution functionality.

Shiny Hunting Utility Items

  • Two new items, the Shiny Charm and three tiers of Shiny Sandwiches, make shiny hunting more fun and accessible.
  • Shiny Sandwiches grant the new Sparkling Power status effect, boosting shiny odds by 1 roll per level.
  • With a Shiny Charm and a Tier III Shiny Sandwich, you can achieve odds as low as 1/683 from the base 1/4096!

16 Unique Badges for Gyms

  • Features 16 custom badges, each with unique buffs and gameplay-enhancing perks.
  • Adds a new badge slot via the Trinkets API, so badges can act as powerful pieces of equipment.
  • Includes 10 base-type badges and 6 community-designed badges, created by members of the DANDYCORP community.

New Metals for Late and Post-Game

  • Access Chromium, a metal designed as an easier way to craft netherite-tier gear without the grind.
  • Introduces Paragonium, a god-tier post-game metal for advanced tools and equipment. (Commissioned from the very talented Akaleaf)
    • Paragonium does not have a recipe by default but can be configured for your server or single-player balance.

Dependencies

This mod serves as the backbone for a modpack, so it requires several dependencies:

Minecraft and Fabric

  • Minecraft: 1.20.1
  • Fabric Loader
  • Fabric API

Key Libraries and Mods

  • Cobblemon
  • Trinkets
  • Alloy Forgery
  • Create (Fabric version)
  • GeckoLib
  • Roughly Enough Items (REI)
  • Cardinal Components API
  • Owo UI Library

Stay tuned—this mod is still in active development, with new features and updates coming soon!


Known issues:

  • paragonium nugget has no point value??
  • colored shulkers have no point value
  • unhandled button ID conflicts on vendor config
